writing.task1:
Dear Market Coordinaror
I would like to apply for a permit to operate a small stall at Central Street Market on Monday 11 and Tuesday 12 August 2025, from 9am to 4pm each day. I will need one standard 240V power outlet and will bring my own bins, ensuring the area is cleaned and all rubbish removed daily. Please let me know if public liability insurance is required, and if so, the level of coverage needed
Thank you for your time
writing.task2: I agree that universities should require community service for graduation. It teaches students responsibility and helps them develop teamwork skills. For example, when students join a beach clean up, they learn how to work with other and care for the enviroment. This experience is useful for their personal growth and future jobs
writing.task3: The chart shows that weekday trips increased for all three commuting modes from January to June. Metro had the highest ridership, rising from 35k to 41k trips. Bus numbers grew from 22k to 29k, while bike share, though lowest in volume, saw the fastest growth, from 6k to 11k trips. A likely reason is warmer weather and improved transport services encouraging more people to commute
